# `unity env` command reference

Generated from Unity CLI `1.0.0-beta.2` help output.

Installed help is authoritative; this file is a versioned snapshot.

## unity env

- CLI version: `1.0.0-beta.2`
- Supported platforms: linux, macos, windows
- Aliases: None

Print Unity Hub environment paths and version

### Usage

`unity env [options]`

### Subcommands

None.

### Positional arguments

None.

### Options

| Option | Value | Required | Repeatable | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `-h`, `--help` | тАФ | False | False | тАФ | display help for command |
| `-V`, `--version` | тАФ | False | False | тАФ | output the version number |
| `--format` | `<format>` | False | False | тАФ | Output format: human, json, tsv, ndjson (env: UNITY_FORMAT) |
| `--no-banner` | тАФ | False | False | тАФ | Suppress the startup banner (env: UNITY_NO_BANNER) |
| `--non-interactive` | тАФ | False | False | тАФ | Disable interactive prompts. Useful in CI/CD environments. (env: UNITY_NON_INTERACTIVE) |
| `--quiet` | тАФ | False | False | тАФ | Suppress informational output (env: UNITY_QUIET) |
| `--verbose` | тАФ | False | False | тАФ | Show full error details including stack traces on failure (env: UNITY_VERBOSE) |
| `--proxy` | `<url>` | False | False | тАФ | HTTP/HTTPS/SOCKS/PAC proxy URL. Examples: http://user:pass@host:8080, socks5://host:1080, pac+http://wpad/proxy.pac (env: UNITY_PROXY) |
| `--proxy-disable` | тАФ | False | False | тАФ | Disable proxy for this invocation, ignoring all sources |
| `--log-proxy` | тАФ | False | False | тАФ | Log every outbound request to proxy-request.json for this run. Off by default; typically used once when reproducing a proxy issue for support. Also settable via UNITY_LOG_PROXY=1 or the proxyRequestLogging user setting. (env: UNITY_LOG_PROXY) |
| `--no-log-proxy` | тАФ | False | False | тАФ | Opt out of --log-proxy / UNITY_LOG_PROXY / the persisted user setting for this run. Use when logging is enabled globally but you want one clean invocation. |

| Variable | Description |

| `UNITY_FORMAT` | Mirrors --format. |
